title: Opendoor Earnings Call Signals Tentative Turn
text: Opendoor (OPEN) Earnings Call Signals Tentative Turn. Opendoor's Q1 2026 earnings call signaled a tentative turn in the company's trajectory toward profitability. Despite revenue headwinds from the challenging housing market, management demonstrated confidence in the new operating model's ability to improve unit economics. The tentative nature of the turn reflects ongoing uncertainties: the broader housing market remains pressured by elevated mortgage rates and constrained inventory, management must execute on aggressive cost reduction targets, shareholders face continued near-term losses before profitability, external competitive responses from larger players like Zillow present execution risks. However, the positive inflection in cohort metrics and the achievement of forward EBITDA profitability represent meaningful progress that may support the stock's recovery trajectory.
